if.test: TOTAL_COUNT == null and sort_column_name != null and sort_type != null

when.test: TOTAL_COUNT == null and page != null and limit != null
TOTAL_COUNT == null and page != null and limit == null

mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT tc.TICKET_ID , CLUSTER_NO , TICKET_TYPE , TICKET_GENERATION_TIME , FAULT_TIME , ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE , ROOT_CAUSE_CODE , ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN , TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT , STATUS , TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE , TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE , TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE , TICKET_UPDATE_TIME , ZERO1_MODEL , ZERO1_ENTROPY , NM.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDR FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current TC INNER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON TC.TICKET_ID = AL.TICKET_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NM ON NM.NODE_ID = al.root_cause_sysnamea WHERE TICKET_TYPE IN ('ATT2', 'NTT') UNION ALL SELECT ALARMNO AS TICKET_ID , NULL CLUSTER_NO , 'SYSLOG' TICKET_TYPE , alarmtime AS TICKET_GENERATION_TIME , NULL FAULT_TIME , NULL ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE , NULL ROOT_CAUSE_CODE , NULL ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN , NULL TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT , CASE WHEN sam.status IN ('INIT', 'FIN', 'AUTO_FIN') THEN sam.status ELSE '-' END AS STATUS , ALARMMSG AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE , ETC AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE , NULL TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE , NULL TICKET_UPDATE_TIME , NULL ZERO1_MODEL , NULL ZERO1_ENTROPY , NM.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDR FROM rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst SAM LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NM ON NM.NODE_ID = SAM.NODE_NM ) T WHERE 1=1 AND t.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME > now() - INTERVAL '48' HOUR

SELECT T.TICKET_ID AS TICKET_ID, T.CLUSTER_NO AS CLUSTER_NO, T.TICKET_TYPE AS TICKET_TYPE, T.TICKET_GENERATION_TIME AS TICKET_GENERATION_TIME, T.FAULT_TIME AS FAULT_TIME, T.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE AS ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE, T.ROOT_CAUSE_CODE AS ROOT_CAUSE_CODE, T.ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN AS ROOT_CAUSE_DOMAIN, T.TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT AS TOTAL_RELATED_ALARM_CNT, T.STATUS AS STATUS, T.PARENT_TICKET_ID AS PARENT_TICKET_ID, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_CODE, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_DTL_CODE, T.TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE AS TICKET_RCA_RESULT_ORIG_DTL_CODE, T.TICKET_UPDATE_TIME AS TICKET_UPDATE_TIME, T.ZERO1_MODEL AS ZERO1_MODEL, T.ZERO1_ENTROPY AS ZERO1_ENTROPY FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current T WHERE 1=1 AND T.OCCUR = TRUE AND T.PARENT_TICKET_ID IS NULL AND TICKET_GENERATION_TIME > NOW() - INTERVAL '48' HOUR AND T.TICKET_TYPE IN ('FTT', 'PF', 'NFTT') ORDER BY TICKET_GENERATION_TIME DESC, TICKET_ID DESC

SELECT SOP.SOP_ID , SOP.TICKET_ID , SOP.TICKET_TYPE , CASE WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'ATT2' THEN '이상 트래픽' WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'NTT' THEN '유해 트래픽' WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'NFTT' THEN '장비 과부하 장애' WHEN SOP.TICKET_TYPE = 'FTT' THEN '비장애' ELSE '장애' END AS TICKETTYPE, SOP.TICKET_RESULT , SOP.STATUS , SOP.REQUEST_TIME , SOP.RECEIVE_TIME , SOP.DETAIL , SOP.fault_classify , SOP.fault_type , SOP.fault_detail_content , SOP.etc_content , SOP.ai_accuracy , al.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA , al.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ , al.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTA , al.ROOT_CAUSE_PORTZ , NODEA.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDRA , NODEZ.IP_ADDR AS IP_ADDRZ , TC.ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE AS ROOT_CAUSE_TYPE , TC.FAULT_TIME AS FAULT_TIME , SOP.HANDLING_ACK_USER AS HANDLING_ACK_USER , SOP.HANDLING_ACK_TIME AS HANDLING_ACK_TIME , SOP.HANDLING_FIN_USER AS HANDLING_FIN_USER , SOP.HANDLING_FIN_TIME AS HANDLING_FIN_TIME , COUNT(1) over () totalCount FROM ( SELECT ticket_id, MAX(ticket_al_id) AS ticket_al_id FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current tac WHERE 1=1
AND tac.TICKET_ID LIKE '%' || #{TICKET_ID} || '%'
AND tac.insert_time > now() - INTERVAL '7' day
AND tac.insert_time >= #{START_DATE}::TIMESTAMP
AND tac.insert_time <= #{END_DATE}::TIMESTAMP
GROUP BY ticket_id ) AL_ID INNER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_al_current AL ON AL.ticket_al_id = AL_ID.ticket_al_id INNER JOIN rca.tb_rca_ticket_current TC ON AL_ID.ticket_id = TC.ticket_id INNER JOIN nia.tb_sop SOP ON SOP.ticket_id = AL_ID.ticket_id LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NODEA ON NODEA.node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA LEFT OUTER JOIN resource.tb_node_mst NODEZ ON NODEZ.node_id = AL.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEZ WHERE 1=1
AND TC.TICKET_TYPE IN (#{TICKET_TYPE})
AND al.ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA = #{ROOT_CAUSE_SYSNAMEA}
ORDER BY SOP.request_time DESC
OFFSET #{OFFSET}
LIMIT #{LIMIT}
